zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Talbot於1215年出生在英國賀福爾布洛米亞德時，他的父親Richard Talbot36歲，母親Aline Basset33歲。他於1249年與Gwenlyn Mechyll在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年9月8日在英國賀福爾可雷登爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Talbot于1215年出生在英国賀福爾布洛米亞德时，他的父亲Richard Talbot36岁，母亲Aline Basset33岁。他于1249年与Gwenlyn Mechyll在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1274年9月8日在英国賀福爾可雷登爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Talbot was born in 1215, in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard Talbot, was 36 and his mother, Aline Basset, was 33. He married Gwenlyn Mechyll in 1249, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 8 September 1274, in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Talbot est né en 1215, à Bromyard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Talbot, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Aline Basset, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Gwenlyn Mechyll en 1249, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1274, à Credenhill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Talbot 1215 in Bromyard, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Talbot 36 und seine Mutter Aline Basset 33. Er hat 1249 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gwenlyn Mechyll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. September 1274 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Credenhill, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Talbot è nato il nel 1215 nel Bromyard, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Talbot, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Aline Basset, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Gwenlyn Mechyll nel 1249, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 settembre 1274, nel Credenhill, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Talbotが1215年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブロムヤルドで生まれた時，父Richard Talbotは36歳，母Aline Bassetは33歳であった。1249年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルでGwenlyn Mechyllと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1274年9月8日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクレデンヒルで59歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Talbot(이)가 1215년 영국 허퍼드실르 브로미아어드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Talbot(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline Basset(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1249년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 Gwenlyn Mechyll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 9월 8일 영국 허퍼드실르 크레데힐에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Talbot nasceu em 1215, em Bromyard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Talbot, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Aline Basset, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenlyn Mechyll em 1249, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1274, em Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Talbot родился в 1215 г. в местности бромярд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Talbot было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline Basset, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenlyn Mechyll в 1249 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 сентября 1274 г. в местности креденилл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хирефордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Gwenlyn Mechyll en 1249, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1274, en Credenhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
